name: sentinel
description: Sentinel v3 — 9-category unified intelligence plugin. Code review, AI dev toolkit, output styles, browser testing, workflow memory, frontend design, documentation, infrastructure, and DX tools in one system.

output_style.description: Active output style injected at session start

churn_threshold.description: Number of edits to the same file before churn warning fires

confidence_threshold.description: Review agent confidence threshold (lower = more findings)

memory_enabled.description: Whether to inject past session learnings at SessionStart

a11y_wcag_level.description: WCAG conformance level for accessibility audits

rollover_trigger.description: Session fork strategy: graduated = warn 75% / offer 85% / auto-fork 95%; manual = only on >rollover; never = always compact

tdd_enforcement.description: Test-first enforcement: off=disabled, warn=advisory message, block=hard PreToolUse gate on src/ writes without test/ sibling

blueprint_gate.description: Require ai-architect blueprint approval before ai-builder writes files

team_mode.description: Team mode: lineage is per-user and gitignored; typed learnings are shared and committed

risk_gating.description: Auto-classify diff risk tier (GREEN/YELLOW/RED/CRITICAL) before launching review agents — saves Opus tokens on trivial changes

compression_enabled.description: Enable PostToolUse output compression — debounced token saver, ~7k tokens/session

design_system_enabled.description: Load .sentinel/design-system.md at session start and detect UI drift on edits
